info.title: Data Management Service (DMS) API — v1 (query-only)
info.description:
Central DMS focused on Catalog, Introspection, Contracts
Serving (dynamic datasets + CRUD/Query/Export).

post.summary: Publish/Update data contract (schema, DQ, runtime query plan)

get.summary: Read a specific data contract version
List rows from a dataset (policy-aware, dynamic)

schema.description: allowlisted column name with optional '-' prefix

post.summary: Export a dataset to object storage (csv/xlxs)

job_id.description: The ID of the export job

get.summary: Get status of an export job
Get the result of an export job

file.description: The report file to be imported (e.g., CSV, Excel)

dataset_id.description: The ID of the dataset to import the report into

job_id.description: The ID of the import job

400.description: Bad request (e.g., missing parameters, invalid file format)

get.summary: Get status of an import job
Get the result of an export job

file.description: The PDF template file to be imported

columns.description: List of column names in the template

position.description: List of positions corresponding to the columns

dataset_id.description: The ID of the dataset associated with the template

template_id.description: The ID of the imported PDF template

400.description: Bad request (e.g., missing parameters, invalid file format)

template_id.description: The ID of the PDF template

columns.description: List of column names in the template

position.description: List of positions corresponding to the columns

dataset_id.description: The ID of the dataset associated with the template

created_at.description: Timestamp when the template was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated

columns.description: List of column names in the template

position.description: List of positions corresponding to the columns

dataset_id.description: The ID of the dataset associated with the template

template_id.description: The ID of the updated PDF template

400.description: Bad request (e.g., missing parameters, invalid data)

post.summary: Export a PDF report based on a template

template_id.description: The ID of the PDF template to use for the report

dataset_id.description: The ID of the dataset to generate the report from

key.description: The key identifying the specific report instance to generate

job_id.description: The ID of the export job

400.description: Bad request (e.g., missing parameters, invalid template ID)

404.description: Not found (e.g., template or dataset not found)

get.summary: Get status of an import job

status.description: The current status of the job (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed, failed)

get.summary: Get status of an import job

job_id.description: The ID of the PDF template export job

status.description: The current status of the job (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed, failed)

download_url.description: The URL to download the generated PDF report (present if status is completed)

error_message.description: Error message if the job failed

created_at.description: The timestamp when the job was created

completed_at.description: The timestamp when the job was completed (present if status is completed or failed)

XDataPurpose.name: X-Data-Purpose
XDataPurpose.description: Purpose binding for personal data (optional in this profile)

JobId.name: job_id
JobId.description: The ID of the export job
